limits: Diagnostic output only; no runtime context selection changes.
Does not mutate ContextPackManifest.items or any context-selection result.
Does not change provider prompts or prompt rendering.
Does not persist graph nodes, graph edges, manifests, indexes, or memory records.
Does not introduce a graph database.
Does not call retrieval services, embedding services, rerankers, or production indexes.
Does not perform automatic inclusion in context packs.
Future edge seed records are explicitly non-authoritative.
name: Read-only graph neighborhood advisor
recommended_next_actions: Keep graph-neighborhood advice diagnostic-only until a separate PLAN/WARRANT admits context-pack integration.
Use the advisor to inspect graph-local evidence and relation paths, not as an automatic selector.
risks: Diagnostic neighborhood suggestions may be mistaken for context-selection authority unless selection_effect none and diagnostic-only boundaries remain explicit.
Future integration with context packs, graph persistence, retrieval, embeddings, or prompt changes requires separate governed plans and warrants.
summary: Provides deterministic, read-only graph-neighborhood diagnostic advice for artifact records, validated EDGE records, and non-authoritative future edge seeds. The advisor reports neighboring candidates, relation paths, source authority, token estimates, and diagnostic inclusion/exclusion rationale without modifying runtime context selection or provider prompts.
